productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Black Dial Watch
description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Case diameter: 52 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel rectangle case with embossed numbers on the bezel Broad green genuine leather strap and a tang clasp with a one-prong buckle ed hardy print on the strap Black textured dial with metallic hands and a print on the dial Date aperture on the 3 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant up to 50 meters
